_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ensure collected data is properly post-processed.
reference_document_element_description: Monitor data quality within the assigned domain, document issues, initiate remediation workflows, and track resolution to closure.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-T-016 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-T-005 (DQ, cosine: 0.509), DQ-T-013 (DQ, cosine: 0.467).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.9/10 (raw 0.394). Shared vocabulary: [data]. DCWF-only terms [collected, ensure, post, processed, properly] vs WIDAI-only terms [assigned, closure, document, domain, initiate, issues] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.874 (P=0.892, R=0.857). P exceeds R by 0.035 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Ensure collected data is properly post-processed." and "Monitor data quality within the assigned domain, document issues, initiate remed" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.518 > STS 0.394 (gap +0.124). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [data] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.3%. Shared tokens: [data]. DCWF-only: [collected, ensure, post, processed, properly]. WIDAI-only: [assigned, closure, document, domain, initiate, issues].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.124 suggests some vocabulary-driven inflation in candidate selection.
